Dramatis Personae

  • Captain Robert de Baudricourt

  • A steward

  • Joan

  • Bertrand de Poulengey

  • The Archbishop of Rheims

  • Monseigneur de la Trémouille

  • A page

  • Gilles de Rais, known as Bluebeard

  • Captain La Hire

  • The Dauphin, afterwards King Charles VII

  • A nobleman

  • Dunois’ page

  • Richard de Beauchamp, Earl of Warwick

  • Warwick’s page

  • John de Stogumber, an English chaplain

  • Cauchon, Bishop of Beauvais

  • Brother John Lemaître, a Dominican monk and Inquisitor

  • Canon John D’Estivet, the Promoter

  • Brother Martin Ladvenu, a young Dominican

  • The Executioner

  • An English soldier

  • A clerical gentleman

  • Courtiers, men-at-Arms, ladies in waiting, assessors, soldiers, executioner’s assistants
